name: texas-sandfest
description: Texas SandFest operations and visitor experience platform.

scripts.build:public: SANDFEST_BUILD_TARGET=public SANDFEST_BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-public VITE_SANDFEST_SURFACE=public vite build && node scripts/finalize-public-build.mjs
scripts.build:public:pages-check: DEPLOY_BASE=/texas-sandfest/ SANDFEST_DEPLOYMENT_ENV=production SANDFEST_BUILD_VERIFICATION=true VITE_SANDFEST_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY=1x00000000000000000000AA npm run build:public && DEPLOY_BASE=/texas-sandfest/ npm run test:pages-artifact
scripts.build:admin: SANDFEST_BUILD_TARGET=admin SANDFEST_BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-admin VITE_SANDFEST_SURFACE=admin vite build && node scripts/promote-admin-build.mjs
scripts.build:admin:production-check: SANDFEST_DEPLOYMENT_ENV=production VITE_SANDFEST_AUTH_MODE=oidc VITE_SANDFEST_AUTH_ISSUER=https://auth.heyelab.com/ VITE_SANDFEST_AUTH_CLIENT_ID=sandfest-admin-build-verification VITE_SANDFEST_AUTH_REDIRECT_URI=https://sandfest-admin.heyelab.com/ VITE_SANDFEST_AUTH_POST_LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URI=https://sandfest-admin.heyelab.com/ VITE_SANDFEST_AUTH_SCOPES='openid profile email' VITE_SANDFEST_AUTH_AUDIENCE=https://sandfest-api.heyelab.com VITE_SANDFEST_API_BASE_URL=https://sandfest-api.heyelab.com SANDFEST_BOARD_DEMO_ADMIN_TOKEN=board-demo-production-leak-sentinel npm run build:admin
scripts.build:surfaces: npm run build:public:production-check && npm run build:admin:production-check && node scripts/test-static-surfaces.mjs && npm run build:public:pages-check
scripts.ready: npm run public:sync && npm run test:platform && npm run build
scripts.video:board: npm run video:board:capture && npm run video:board:render
scripts.test:accessibility: playwright test tests/board-browser.spec.mjs --grep 'WCAG A and AA'
scripts.ready:camera-edge: npm run test:camera-agent && npm run test:camera-fleet-qualification && npm run camera:model:verify && npm run test:camera-agent:runtime && npm run test:camera-agent:fleet-runtime && npm run camera:fleet:verify
scripts.ready:production: npm run test:platform && npm run test:quickbooks-credentials && npm run test:platform:api && npm run test:board-runtime && npm run test:board-supervisor && npm run test:browser && npm run test:postgres && npm run test:camera-agent && npm run test:camera-fleet-qualification && npm run test:camera-model-approval && npm run test:deployment-verifier && npm run test:container-contract && npm run test:render-blueprint && npm run test:vercel-project-guard && npm run build:surfaces && npm audit --audit-level=high
scripts.board:api: SANDFEST_RUNTIME_ROOT=.sandfest-runtime/board-2027 SANDFEST_INCOMING_DOCUMENT_DIR=.sandfest-runtime/board-2027/private/incoming-documents SANDFEST_EVENT_ID=texas-sandfest-2027 SANDFEST_API_PORT=8806 SANDFEST_API_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8806 SANDFEST_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=${SANDFEST_BOARD_PUBLIC_SITE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:5175} SANDFEST_ADMIN_API_TOKEN=board-demo-local-admin-token-change-me SANDFEST_BOARD_CONDITIONS_MODE=synthetic OUTREACH_DISCOVERY_ENABLED=true OUTREACH_DISCOVERY_PROVIDER=fixture CAMERA_INGEST_ENABLED=true CAMERA_INGEST_SECRET=board-demo-local-camera-secret-change-me TRANSACTIONAL_EMAIL_ENABLED=true BREVO_API_KEY=board-demo-local-brevo-api-key-change-me BREVO_SENDER_EMAIL=sandbox@texassandfest.example BREVO_SENDER_NAME='Texas SandFest Board Demo' BREVO_REPLY_TO_EMAIL=reply@texassandfest.example BREVO_WEBHOOK_TOKEN=board-demo-local-brevo-webhook-token-change-me BREVO_API_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:8807/v3/smtp/email SMS_ENABLED=true TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID=AC00000000000000000000000000000001 TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN=board-demo-local-twilio-auth-token-change-me TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER=+13615550100 TWILIO_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8808 TWILIO_STATUS_CALLBACK_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8806/api/webhooks/twilio/status TWILIO_SAFETY_INBOUND_WEBHOOK_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8806/api/webhooks/twilio/inbound/smsSafety node scripts/admin-api-server.mjs
scripts.board:worker: SANDFEST_RUNTIME_ROOT=.sandfest-runtime/board-2027 SANDFEST_INCOMING_DOCUMENT_DIR=.sandfest-runtime/board-2027/private/incoming-documents SANDFEST_EVENT_ID=texas-sandfest-2027 SANDFEST_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=${SANDFEST_BOARD_PUBLIC_SITE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:5175} SANDFEST_WORKER_ONCE=true TRANSACTIONAL_EMAIL_ENABLED=true BREVO_API_KEY=board-demo-local-brevo-api-key-change-me BREVO_SENDER_EMAIL=sandbox@texassandfest.example BREVO_SENDER_NAME='Texas SandFest Board Demo' BREVO_REPLY_TO_EMAIL=reply@texassandfest.example BREVO_WEBHOOK_TOKEN=board-demo-local-brevo-webhook-token-change-me SANDFEST_API_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8806 BREVO_API_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:8807/v3/smtp/email SMS_ENABLED=true TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID=AC00000000000000000000000000000001 TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN=board-demo-local-twilio-auth-token-change-me TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER=+13615550100 TWILIO_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8808 TWILIO_STATUS_CALLBACK_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8806/api/webhooks/twilio/status TWILIO_SAFETY_INBOUND_WEBHOOK_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8806/api/webhooks/twilio/inbound/smsSafety node scripts/worker.mjs
scripts.board:worker:watch: SANDFEST_RUNTIME_ROOT=.sandfest-runtime/board-2027 SANDFEST_INCOMING_DOCUMENT_DIR=.sandfest-runtime/board-2027/private/incoming-documents SANDFEST_EVENT_ID=texas-sandfest-2027 SANDFEST_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=${SANDFEST_BOARD_PUBLIC_SITE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:5175} TRANSACTIONAL_EMAIL_ENABLED=true BREVO_API_KEY=board-demo-local-brevo-api-key-change-me BREVO_SENDER_EMAIL=sandbox@texassandfest.example BREVO_SENDER_NAME='Texas SandFest Board Demo' BREVO_REPLY_TO_EMAIL=reply@texassandfest.example BREVO_WEBHOOK_TOKEN=board-demo-local-brevo-webhook-token-change-me SANDFEST_API_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8806 BREVO_API_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:8807/v3/smtp/email SMS_ENABLED=true TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID=AC00000000000000000000000000000001 TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN=board-demo-local-twilio-auth-token-change-me TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER=+13615550100 TWILIO_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8808 TWILIO_STATUS_CALLBACK_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8806/api/webhooks/twilio/status TWILIO_SAFETY_INBOUND_WEBHOOK_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8806/api/webhooks/twilio/inbound/smsSafety node scripts/worker.mjs
